mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tunnel t INNER JOIN cluster c ON c.cluster_id = t.cluster_id WHERE t.tunnel_id = #{tunnelId} AND c.region = #{region} AND t.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT t.* FROM tunnel t INNER JOIN cluster c ON c.cluster_id = t.cluster_id WHERE t.namespace = #{namespace} AND c.region = #{region} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
